name: Chili & Beans for a Crowd
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions until translucent.
2. Add oil to a stockpot and brown beef over medium-high heat.
3. Sprinkle salt over the meat.
4. Grind cumin and fennel seeds and add them to the meat mixture with onion, garlic, chili powder, cocoa, and sugar.
5. Stir in tomatoes and tomato sauce, then add 4 cups of water.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil and reduce heat to a simmer. Stir occasionally for about 3 1/2 hours. If it becomes too thick, add more water.
7. In a heavy pot, cook bacon until crisp.
8. Add beans, garlic, salt, and water to the bacon fat. Bring to a boil over moderate heat.
9. Reduce heat and simmer, stirring occasionally until the beans are tender (about 1 1/2 hours).
10. Use a slotted spoon to transfer the beans to the chili. Adjust the consistency of the chili with additional liquid if needed.
